body: Sprint 1 planned. 5 cards in Backlog. Goal: v0.1 CLI scan + axe-core + ESLint JSX a11y + LLM critique spike + self-scan acceptance gate. See PRD for full spec.
Card moved: ‘README + report formats’ Backlog → Backlog

09:15 standup — Sprint 1 not started. No cards In Progress. Escalating to project-domain-lead: move card-1 (Repo scaffold) to In Progress, dispatch scrum-master for implementation planning. card-1 is the sequencing root for all v0.1 work.

Sprint 1 kickoff acknowledged. Moving card-1 (Repo scaffold) to In Progress. Dispatching scrum-master to plan implementation steps: (1) npm init, tsconfig.json, strict mode; (2) ESLint config with eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y; (3) axe-core + playwright devDependencies; (4) src/cli.ts with `a11yai scan <url>` stub using commander; (5) package.json bin entry. card-2 through card-5 remain Backlog pending card-1 completion.

card-1 implementation steps planned. Subtasks: (1) `npm init -y && tsc --init` with strict:true, target:ES2022, module:NodeNext; (2) install axe-core, @axe-core/playwright, playwright, eslint, eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, @typescript-eslint/parser, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, commander; (3) .eslintrc.json with jsx-a11y/recommended; (4) src/cli.ts: commander program with `scan <url>` command stub that logs ‘Scanning <url>...’ and exits 0; (5) package.json bin: { a11yai: ‘./dist/cli.js’ }; (6) npm run build script; (7) initial jest config for future unit tests. Acceptance: `npx ts-node src/cli.ts scan http://localhost:3001` runs without error.
